title: SlashBlade：AcceleratedRendering
description: Make older versions (below 1.8.57) compatible with accelerated rendering for SlashBlade：Resharped.
body:
Make older versions (below 1.8.57) compatible with [accelerated rendering](https://modrinth.com/mod/acceleratedrendering) for "**[SlashBlade: Resharped](https://modrinth.com/mod/slashblade-resharped)**".

**You can still add the mod above this version, but the functionality will not work :P**

**If you have ideas or bugs,plz:**
[Issues · Arcomit/AcceleratedBlade](https://github.com/Arcomit/AcceleratedBlade/issues)
or
[Pull requests · Arcomit/AcceleratedBlade](https://github.com/Arcomit/AcceleratedBlade/pulls)

Github:
[Arcomit/AcceleratedBlade: 让重锋全版本兼容加速渲染](https://github.com/Arcomit/AcceleratedBlade)

License：
[LGPL-2.1 license](https://github.com/Arcomit/AcceleratedBlade/blob/master/LICENSE)

———————————————————

让旧版本（低于1.8.57）重锋兼容加速渲染。

高于这个版本你仍然可以添加该模组，但功能并不会生效:P


**有想法或bug，请：**
[Issues · Arcomit/AcceleratedBlade](https://github.com/Arcomit/AcceleratedBlade/issues)
或
[Pull requests · Arcomit/AcceleratedBlade](https://github.com/Arcomit/AcceleratedBlade/pulls)

Github:
[Arcomit/AcceleratedBlade: 让重锋全版本兼容加速渲染](https://github.com/Arcomit/AcceleratedBlade)
